reason: Write-enabled review-and-fix of all three deliverables completed and applied edits (context.md/reasoning.md/answer.md patched, structural checks run, second independent reviewer made a small two-file patch and validated); changes re-verified by hand (math re-checked incl. sympy verification of the Langevin variance recursion and numeric checks of the overlap-C formula, in-frame style preserved, code faithful to canonical get_sigmas). The companion process's non-zero wrapper exit (144) occurred only in a self-spawned NESTED recursive sub-review that began after the actual review of these files had already finished and applied its fixes.
